feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: What is the best way to handle NZ Localisation to Allow for Investment Boost?
entry.content:
In New Zealand the Government has implemented a new depreciation scheme as of the 22nd of May 2025.  This key change allows NZ businesses to have an additional upfront depreciation deduction of 20% followed by ordinary depreciation of the remaining 80% from the date of acquistion.

I can't seem to locate any information to see if there is a localisation request for this for New Zealand.  We have also looked at the Exprt Configuration spreadsheet but I would define this as a "Local legal requirement" in which case the information dialog box says to raise a ticket.

Is there a way in Public Cloud to handle this out of the box or how do we go about getting a localisation change made for NZ?

Please see a reference link to the change below.

New assets - Investment Boost

entry.title: We need to download billing documents in mass at a time
entry.content:
we already tried this way and we are getting the out put in binary coded (kindly check the attachment) how can we convert that binary output into pdf .this is what we want to know exactly .

please kindly check and let us know how can we convert that binary code into pdf to produce the output to buiness.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/mass-download-billing-document-pdf-output/qaq-p/13707076


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Tax not derived in professional services project based sales order
entry.content:
Scope - J11 is used in the current system setup. customer project is created and the sales order is generated by the system automatically. while creating the billing document, it is observed that system is not deriving the sales tax. 

sales order ID - 8; Customer ID - 90000, product- P001.

entry.title: what is the odatav2 api to add a material assignment to production routing header
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i've been using the API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING api to post a new material assignment to SAP public cloud.

somehting like this:

query = `/ProductionRoutingHeader(ProductionRouting='${ProductionRout}', ProductionRoutingGroup='${ProductionRoutGroup}',ProductionRoutingInternalVers='${ProductionRoutiVers}')/to_MatlAssgmt`
and then post the product and plant in the payload.
 
but it seems this got deprecated. Is there a replacement for this? i cant seem to find the same type of endpoint.
Thank you.

entry.title: Invoice Date Control While Creating Customer Invoice
entry.content:
We need to create a custom control while creating customer invoice based on invoice date entered in Create Billing Documents - VF01 screen. We tried to achieve it on SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER BADI however, the date entered in Create Billing Documents - VF01 screen is not coming in any of the changing parameters of this BADI. We wanted to call this value form another program in ABAP, however, in Public Cloud SAP does not allow us to call program from another program. Please guide me how can we proceed on this regards if we are mistaken at some point. 

Business Case : User created a customer invoice for the date 17.06.2025, and when a user try to create customer invoice for the past date after the first invoice system should not allow to create a customer invoice as it will break the rule of chronological customer invoice numbering & invoice date. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Can B/S Reclassification in S4 Public Cloud only regroup customer and supplier on line item level?
entry.content:
Hi all,

While demonstrating the B/S Reclassification Run in Schedule General Ledger Jobs to our customer we came across the following issue. During the execution of the run, SAP evaluates the individual line items, which resulted in a customer credit invoice being recorded as a liability, even though the total balance for this customer is a receivable. 

This is in violation of the Dutch Civil Code and the Financial Statement Regulations. Customer balances should only be displayed as a liability when the total balance on this customer is a payable amount instead of receivable amount. The same goes for suppliers the other way around. 

Below is a screenshot from Define rules for B/S Reclassification. The grouping field sounds like it could be an option but we're unable to make any changes. 

Is there a possibility to adjust settings for regrouping so that the total balance on customers / suppliers is evaluated during the run instead of the line items?

entry.title: On Create Initial Balance, an error message "Memo record type is invalid" occurs.
entry.content:
1. Memo record type invalid error in the App Create Initial Balance and Balance Adjustment with Reference.
  2. F4 help for Memo Record Type in the App Create Initial Balance and Balance Adjustment with Reference displays a message "No Value Found".

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: When entering stock and non stock item in order cost is getting updated in one category YB2
entry.content:
When entering stock and non stock item in order cost is getting updated in one category YB2

We are trying to maintain materials for consumption (stock item) and procurement (non stock item) in maintenance order but after entering the cost is getting updated in one category only YB2. Ideally it should go to YB2 for stock items and YB3 for non stock items. 

Material type used is ERSA

Please can anyone suggest what is missing in material or configuration

entry.title: Restrict Manage Banks, Manage Banks Cash Management, Manage Bank Accounts only for display access
entry.content:
We are unable to restrict the below apps only for display access because the default condition in the system is with the write access.  If multiple roles are assigned to the user along with the display role of these apps, the user is still able to make changes in these apps.


Manage Banks - Master Data (F6437)


Manage Banks- Cash Management (F1574)


Manage Bank Accounts (F1366A)  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 1 Project for multiple profit centers?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I hope you can help me with this.

My customer has around 2,000 profit centers and want to use projects to track the acquisition of assets, this can be 44 different type of assets which would be 44 WBS elements in the project structure, the problem comes when they came back to me asking to use only 1 project for all the 2,000 profit centers, if I am not mistaken, SAP is limited to only use one profit center per WBS element, so if we create one project this would give us a project with almost 90,000 wbs elements which is not maneagable, so what would you recommend? Is there a functionality that allows me to use 1 project with only 44 WBS elements but still be able to derive/post against different profit centers?

Thanks in advance!

D

entry.title: 세금계산서 발행 및 계산서일자 조정 요청
entry.content:
안녕하세요.

6월 10 ~ 12일에 진행 된  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Go-live Experience Workshop 관련 Invoice를 받았는데요.

관련하여 3명이 참석했었고 3개의 Invoice를 각각 수신하였습니다.

하지만 회사에서 처리 하려면 Invoice가 아닌 세금계산서가 필요합니다.

대상 Invoice No. :  9039006980, 9039006981,  9039006982

Invoice 일자  : 7월 1일

감사합니다.

entry.title: Having Trouble Uploading XSD File to "Define Statutory Report" Fiori App?
entry.content:
I'm encountering an issue when trying to upload an XSD file into the "Define Statutory Report" Fiori app. I'm using an XSD file generated from the "Maintain Form Template" app, but I receive the following error message:

"File YY1_XXX.xsd does not have any entry points. Upload a valid file."

Could anyone help me understand why this error is occurring and how to resolve it?

entry.title: Project Plan Cost are different
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have imported Financial Plan for Project plan, amount is 8M.

When I recheck the app. Project Costs shows only 4M.

Why they are different amount.

entry.title: Double Pallet Type for A Material
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

My client wants to make different packing instructions for a material 

P = Pallet 1    => 10 M 

P= Pallet 2     => 20 M

Can we maintain this requirement?

Regards,

Melani 

EWM - Delivery Processing #pop1

entry.title: Increase Alternative bank account number field S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a question regarding the "Alternative Bank Account Number" field within the house bank connectivity.

Some of our companies manage several currency accounts under a single main account number. In such cases, the upload of account statements only works if the Alternative Bank Account Number field is populated with the specific account ID provided by the bank. Unfortunately, this field appears to be too short to accommodate the full value.

Is there a way to extend the length of this field?
Any insights, solutions, or experiences you could share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards, 
Merle

entry.title: Public Cloud: App F0869A , message VL134 when sales BOM with EWM and IM
entry.content:
Hello,

We are in S4 Public Cloud.

To create deliveries we used app F0869A (Create outbound deliveries from sales order).

We have materials stored in EWM storage location and in normal storage location (IM).

At item level of the sales order, the field Part Dlv/Item is set to C.

When we create deliveries, it currently creates 2 deliveries: 1 for EWM and 1 for IM which is fine.

Now we are currently testing sales BOM where in the BOM we have also EWM materials and IM materials.

In this case the app doesn't want to create deliveries and end-up with error message VL134:

Is it normal?

Thanks,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: Unable to call Update API using http request
entry.content:
I'm trying to call the FixedAsset API to update an asset from S/4 Public Cloud using RAP.

However, I am getting an error from the API - "State of entity CDS~A_FIXEDASSET with key XXXXX was already changed (stale If-Match)"

in before, I am getting an error about missing etag. Now, I'm taking the system date and time to be used as etag. I search that doing a batch request can do this but have no idea how to code it and I am using http client request and not service consumption model.

 DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
comm_scenario = 'XXX'
service_id = 'XX'
comm_system_id = 'XXX'
).
DATA(lo_http_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ). 

DATA(lo_request) = lo_http_client->get_http_request( ).

DATA(lv_uri) = |/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_fixedasset/srvd_a2x/sap/fixedasset/0001/FixedAsset/&1/&2/&3/SAP__self.Change|.

DATA(lv_date) = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ).
DATA(lv_time) = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_time( ).
DATA(lv_etag) = | { lv_date+0(4) }-{ lv_date+4(2) }-{ lv_date+6(2) }T{ lv_time+0(2) }:{ lv_time+2(2) }:{ lv_time+4(2) }Z|.

lo_request->set_header_field(
EXPORTING
i_name = 'if-match'
i_value = |W/"datetimeoffset'{ lv_etag }'"|
).

lo_request->set_uri_path( lv_uri ).

DATA(lo_res) = lo_http_client->execute( if_web_http_client=>post ).
DATA(lv_text) = lo_res->get_text( ).

can you provide a solution so I can update asset using API?

entry.title: Is it OK to overwrite details for standard Cost Center Categories in S/4HANA Public Cloud? 102498
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

11 Cost Center Categories are provided in S/4HANA Public Cloud:

The customer needs different Cost Center Category definitions (i.e. different names, check-box defaults and functional area) but the Cost Centre Category itself is only 1 alphanumeric character and there are namespace restrictions:

making the creation of new Cost Center Categories quite restricted. 

Help for the SSCUI (102498) does not clarify whether - if changes are needed - it is OK to change the SAP-supplied Cost Center Categories.  It's presumed that this is OK/low-risk, but we would like official confirmation of this before we proceed. 

Please can you confirm whether it is OK for us to change the name, check-boxes and functional area for SAP-supplied Cost Center Categories? 

Many thanks,

Jules

entry.title: Action In ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a SAP RAP and use Actions following the provided instructions (Actions).  How to set Group Two Action in Select like below Picture?

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!
